effect.name: AM Pitch Shifter
effect.description:
AM Pitch Shifter (LADSPA 1433)
This effect works by running a single write pointer (monotonic) and two read pointers (pitchscaled) over a ringbuffer. The output is faded between the two readpointers according to the sine of the distance from the write pointer.
effect.author: Steve Harris (http://www.ladspa.org)

parameter.name: Pitch Shift
parameter.comment:
The multiple of the output pitch.
For example, 2.00 will increase the pitch by one octave.

parameter.name: Buffer Size
parameter.comment:
The order of magnitude of the buffer size.
Small buffers will sound fluttery, large buffers will have flangy sounding echos.
